emails.subject: FPL PPA
emails.body: Kay: A while ago, you sent me a copy of an FPL PPA for Homestead. Could you please resend me the document? Thanks, Ben

emails.subject: Re: FPL PPA
emails.body: Re: FPL PPA I don't remember a PPA for Homestead. I'll check, though. Kay From: Ben F Jacoby ECT 05/16/2001 12:03 PM Sent by: Ben Jacoby@ECT

emails.subject: Re: FPL PPA
emails.body: It was a deal Ozzie was working on with FPL. Kay Mann@ENRON 05/16/2001 12:04 PM

emails.subject: Re: FPL PPA
emails.body: It was a deal Ozzie was working on with FPL. Kay Mann@ENRON 05/16/2001 12:04 PM

emails.subject: Re: FPL PPA
emails.body: I'm remembering now. It was a term sheet which was never executed, as far as I know. I believe FPL prepared it, and we may have commented on it. Let me see what I can find. Kay From: Ben F Jacoby ECT 05/16/2001 12:09 PM Sent by: Ben Jacoby@ECT
